title: digitacalia chiapensis
intro: Digitacalia chiapensis, also known as Hierba del Diablo, is a plant species native to Mexico, classified as a flowering plant within the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Digitacalia chiapensis include wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or ointments, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
